spec_updates.highlight: Open question: whether `blockHash` param in `getInclusionList` Engine API is necessary if CL/EL share the same head; needs further analysis before merging Engine API PRs
EL store revamp planned: signed IL storage, request-response feeding into EngineList, and replacing inclusion committee route with dependent route (consensus-specs PR #5424, #5460)
Paris spec question raised: initial payload requires empty transaction set — Jihoon to investigate whether this needs updating for FOCIL (IL transactions could be included from block start)
Request-response for ILs: intended only for proposers and builders, not attesters; spec should clarify this

testing_progress.highlight: Lodestar blocked on EIP-7688 changes merging to unstable before rebasing; expects to target devnet 7
Besu on Glamsterdam devnet 6; last run two weeks ago was not working
Yochum to start adding execution tests for FOCIL this week

devnet_planning.highlight: Local interop tentatively planned between Lodestar and Besu on Alpha 12 ahead of FOCIL devnet
Next CL spec release targeted a few days before devnet 8 (~first week of August); waiting on EL store revamp to complete first

action_items.action: Resolve `blockHash` parameter necessity in `getInclusionList` Engine API before merging Engine API PRs (execution-apis PR #609)
Investigate Paris spec requirement for empty initial payload; determine if FOCIL requires spec change

decisions.decision: CL spec release to target ~5 days before FOCIL devnet 8 (first week of August); local interop between Lodestar and Besu to follow
